name: Banana Bran Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, mix together the milk, eggs, vegetable oil, and vanilla until combined.
2. Add the banana to the blender and process until just mixed.
3. Add the Bran Chex cereal and process until incorporated.
4. Add the remaining dry ingredients (flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, nutmeg) and process until a smooth batter forms.
5. Scrape the sides of the container to ensure everything is well combined.
6. Allow the batter to rest for 5 minutes.
7. Heat a griddle or large pan over medium heat and lightly grease it with oil.
8. Pour about 1/3 to 1/2 cup of batter onto the hot griddle to form pancakes that are approximately 3-4 inches in diameter.
9. Cook until the edges of the pancakes start to set, then gently turn them over.
10. Continue cooking until the bottoms are browned and crispy.
11. Repeat with the remaining batter, adjusting as needed for pancake size.
12. Store leftover pancakes in an airtight container with two layers of wax paper between each layer. To reheat, place in a toaster until warmed through.
(Note: Some recipes call for adding a bit more banana than specified.)
